title: Cuneiform Tablet #0780: Neo-Assyrian Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
